# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[toLower(concat('stg-sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)))]",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "stagingdb",
      "minLength": 1
    },
    "adminLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!"
    },
    "developmentIpRules": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Array of objects: [{\"name\":\"dev1\",\"startIp\":\"x.x.x.x\",\"endIp\":\"x.x.x.x\"}]"
      }
    },
    "skuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S0"
    },
    "skuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard"
    },
    "collation": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
    },
    "maxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "268435456000"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "allowAzureServicesRuleName": "AllowAzureServices"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('adminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('adminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "1.2",
        "restrictOutboundNetworkAccess": "Disabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('allowAzureServicesRuleName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('developmentIpRules')[copyIndex()].name)]",
      "copy": {
        "name": "devIpRuleCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('developmentIpRules'))]"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRules')[copyIndex()].startIp]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRules')[copyIndex()].endIp]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('skuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('skuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[parameters('collation')]",
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]",
        "zoneRedundant": false,
        "readScale": "Disabled"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "fullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
